use_cases: Triggering form submissions and actions in web applications
Navigation actions with different visual emphasis levels
Destructive action confirmation with destructive variant
Icon-only buttons for compact UI actions
Link-styled buttons for inline navigation within text
ai_summary: A reusable React button component built with class-variance-authority for variant management and Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility. Features 6 style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes accessibility features like focus-visible rings and disabled state handling. Designed as a foundational UI primitive for any web application.
